title: Upload files to Monday in a private storage
excerpt:
When I upload a file from the computer to Monday, the file is stored in MONDAY’s storage area. 
Is it possible to define at the organization’s account level that when uploading to MONDAY the files will be stored in the o…

posts.author: leiboj (יעקב לייבוביץ - Jacob Leibovich)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I upload a file from the computer to Monday, the file is stored in MONDAY’s storage area.
Is it possible to define at the organization’s account level that when uploading to MONDAY the files will be stored in the organization’s cloud in SharePoint OnLine or Azure storage ?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! This isn’t possible if you are uploading it to monday, however, you could keep your files in your other cloud storage software, like Google Drive or Dropbox, and link that software to your monday board.

Would this work as an alternative?

posts.author: leiboj (יעקב לייבוביץ - Jacob Leibovich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey ,
Our desire is to allow documents to be saved in One drive/SharePoint .
Today it is only possible to save a link to a document stored in one drive in Monday .

posts.author: KitNZ (Kirsten Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlotte.
Is there a way to save document to the Board, not just in the task update or column link?
